name: search_flights
description: Search for flights on a specific date. Origin and destination accept one or more comma-separated IATA airport codes (e.g. 'LHR,LGW,STN' to search all London airports).

origin.description: Departure airport IATA code(s), comma-separated (e.g. 'JFK' or 'LHR,LGW,STN').

destination.description: Arrival airport IATA code(s), comma-separated (e.g. 'JFK' or 'LHR,LGW,STN').

return_date.description: Return date in YYYY-MM-DD format for round trips. Omit for one-way.

cabin_class.description: Cabin class: ECONOMY, PREMIUM_ECONOMY, BUSINESS, or FIRST. Defaults to ECONOMY.

max_stops.description: Maximum stops: ANY, NON_STOP, ONE_STOP_OR_FEWER, or TWO_OR_FEWER_STOPS. Defaults to ANY.

passengers.description: Number of adult passengers. Defaults to 1.

sort_by.description: Sort order: CHEAPEST, DURATION, DEPARTURE_TIME, or ARRIVAL_TIME. Defaults to CHEAPEST.
